mapper.insert: INSERT INTO warehouse_user(username, password, real_name, phone, email, role, status) VALUES(#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{role}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE warehouse_user SET status=0 WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM warehouse_user WHERE id=#{id} AND status=1
SELECT * FROM warehouse_user WHERE username=#{username} AND status=1

SELECT * FROM warehouse_user
status=1
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{realName}, '%')
AND role = #{role}
ORDER BY created_at DESC
